title: cubesdufutur
description: Immersive modpack with extended biomes and mechanics
body:
# ![cubesdufutur](data:image/png;base64,) This modpack aims to renew the Minecraft experience by adding new mechanics, blocks and quality of life features while still keeping a coherent and immersive universe. It must be installed on both the server and the client. Included mods are preconfigured for the best experience. ## Highlights - Complex machines with [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) - Improved storage with [Tom's Simple Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage), [Extended Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-drawers) and [Scout](https://modrinth.com/mod/scout) - New ways of moving around with [Eureka](https://modrinth.com/mod/eureka), [Wraith Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/fwaystones) and [Chalk](https://modrinth.com/mod/chalk) - New food with [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) - Artistic freedom with [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) - Interactions with other players with [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) and [Simple Voice Radio](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-radio) - A ton of new biomes with [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit) - Renewed structures to explore with [ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village), [YUNG's Better Dungeons](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-dungeons) and [YUNG's Better Mineshafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-mineshafts) - More furniture and decor with [Another Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture) ## Included Mods
New Mechanics - [Chalk](https://modrinth.com/mod/chalk) - [Chalk: Colorful Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/chalk-colorful-addon) - [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) - [Create Jetpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-jetpack) - [Create: Power Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-power-loader-fabric) - [Create Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice) - [Eureka](https://modrinth.com/mod/eureka) - [Extended Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-drawers) - [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) - [Nature's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-delight) - [Scout](https://modrinth.com/mod/scout) - [Tom's Simple Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) - [Wraith Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/fwaystones)
Terrain & Structures - [ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village) - [Create: Structures](https://modrinth.com/datapack/create-structures) - [Geophilic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic) - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit) - [Profundis](https://modrinth.com/mod/profundis) - [Stony Cliffs Are Cool](https://modrinth.com/datapack/stony-cliffs-are-cool) - [YUNG's Better Desert Temples](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-desert-temples) - [YUNG's Better Dungeons](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-dungeons) - [YUNG's Better Jungle Temples](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-jungle-temples) - [YUNG's Better Mineshafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-mineshafts) - [YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-nether-fortresses) - [YUNG's Better Ocean Monuments](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-ocean-monuments) - [YUNG's Better Strongholds](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-strongholds) - [YUNG's Better Witch Huts](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-witch-huts) - [YUNG's Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-extras)
Interactions - [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) - [FSit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fsit) - [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) - [Simple Voice Radio](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-radio) - [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) - [Voice Chat Interaction](https://modrinth.com/mod/voice-chat-interaction) - [What Are They Up To](https://modrinth.com/mod/what-are-they-up-to)
Aesthetics, Decoration, Blocks & Objects - [Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments) - [Another Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture) - [Armor Poser](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-poser) - [Bedspreads](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedspreads) - [Connectible Chains](https://modrinth.com/mod/connectible_chains) - [Crate Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/crate-delight) - [Elytra Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-trims) - [Every Compat (Wood Good)](https://modrinth.com/mod/every-compat) - [More Banner Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-banner-features) - [More Mob Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-mob-variants) - [NPC Variety](https://modrinth.com/mod/npc-variety) - [Toggle Item Frames](https://modrinth.com/mod/toggle-item-frames)
